enriched_metadata.display_name: Wine Quality Dataset - Portuguese Vinho Verde
enriched_metadata.objective: Predict wine quality ratings (0-10 scale) based on physicochemical properties of red Portuguese Vinho Verde wines through classification or regression approaches
enriched_metadata.sources: Portuguese Vinho Verde wine data from UCI Machine Learning Repository - physicochemical and sensory evaluation data
enriched_metadata.features_description: 11 physicochemical properties: fixed acidity, volatile acidity, citric acid, residual sugar, chlorides, free sulfur dioxide, total sulfur dioxide, density, pH, sulphates, and alcohol content
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: Red variants of Portuguese Vinho Verde wine with physicochemical measurements and quality scores; limited to specific wine type and geographic region with imbalanced quality distribution
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Highly imbalanced ordinal target with most wines having medium quality scores (5-6), fewer excellent or poor quality wines, reflecting natural wine quality distribution
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: No missing values reported - complete physicochemical measurements for all wine samples
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: High-quality dataset with complete physicochemical measurements and no missing values from standardized wine testing procedures
